tasks.subject: Task 0: Scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Buildable empty app: electron-vite dev/build/typecheck/test/lint run clean.

**Files:** package.json, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.node.json, electron.vite.config.ts, eslint.config.mjs, .gitignore, README.md, stub src/main|preload|renderer.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- typecheck exits 0
- build produces out/main/index.js

**Verify:** npm run typecheck && npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "electron.vite.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["typecheck 0", "out/main/index.js exists"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared contracts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Config+IPC zod schemas, URL/NDI-name hygiene, defaults-on-corrupt.

**Files:** src/shared/schema.ts, src/shared/url.ts, tests/schema.test.ts, tests/url.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- corrupt config -> defaults no throw
- normalizeUrl('vg.no') -> https, file:/javascript:/data: rejected
- IPC schemas reject junk

**Verify:** npx vitest run tests/schema.test.ts tests/url.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/shared/schema.ts", "src/shared/url.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/schema.test.ts tests/url.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["defaults on corrupt", "url allowlist", "schema rejects junk"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Pacer + input map (pure)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Unit-tested frame pacing/stats and DOM->sendInputEvent mapping.

**Files:** src/main/pacer.ts, src/main/input-map.ts, tests/pacer.test.ts, tests/input-map.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- repeat-frame on static page, static flag after 2s
- coord scaling exact at edges
- Enter->Return+char, wheel delta convention locked by test

**Verify:** npx vitest run tests/pacer.test.ts tests/input-map.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/pacer.ts", "src/main/input-map.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/pacer.test.ts tests/input-map.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["repetition", "scaling", "key mapping"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: NDI sender (koffi, BGRA)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** koffi binding: send_create/send_video BGRA/get_no_connections/find; init returns ok|error union (no-runtime graceful).

**Files:** src/main/ndi-sender.ts (adapted from creavid-gjest).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- init ok with NDI Tools installed (proven in Task 11)
- DLL absent -> {ok:false}, no throw

**Verify:** typecheck now; Task 11 selfcheck shows 'NDI ready' + (VEV) in sources

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/ndi-sender.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["graceful no-runtime", "BGRA fourcc 0x41524742", "connections()"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Config store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load/save userData/vev-config.json, atomic write, defaults on corrupt, never throws outward.

**Files:** src/main/config.ts, tests/config.test.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- atomic tmp+rename
- corrupt -> defaults

**Verify:** npx vitest run tests/config.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run tests/config.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["atomic write", "defaults on corrupt"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Capture engine + cards
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Offscreen window lifecycle, paint->NDI, preview JPEG, navigation events, crash recovery (<=3 backoff), input injection, popup->same-frame, permissions denied, audio mute toggle.

**Files:** src/main/capture.ts, resources/testcard.html, resources/errorcard.html.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- static page keeps NDI fed (probe steady fps)
- forced renderer crash auto-recovers
- did-fail-load -> errorcard on air + state.failure

**Verify:** typecheck now; behavioral in Task 11

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/capture.ts", "resources/testcard.html"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["repetition", "recovery", "errorcard"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: IPC + preload bridge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Typed zod-validated channels; named contextBridge surface only; never throw across IPC.

**Files:** src/main/ipc.ts, src/preload/index.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- every inbound payload parsed
- results are ok|error unions

**Verify:** npm run typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/ipc.ts", "src/preload/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zod at boundary", "no generic surface"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Main entry + selfcheck mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire lifecycle: single-instance lock, control window (hardened), autostart, before-quit + crash backstop teardown, VEV_SELFCHECK mode (json+png+optional forced crash).

**Files:** src/main/index.ts.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- selfcheck exits 0, framesSent>300, sources include (VEV), png written

**Verify:** VEV_SELFCHECK=1 npm start (Task 11)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["teardown all exit paths", "selfcheck artifacts"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Renderer UI (VAPOR)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Norwegian VAPOR control surface: top chrome + status pill, URL row, interactive 16:9 preview (mouse/wheel/key forwarding, cursor feedback), settings rail, stats strip, banners (failure/unresponsive/no-runtime).

**Files:** src/renderer/* (App.tsx, components, app.css with VAPOR tokens).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- zero renderer console errors in selfcheck
- click in preview navigates links (live gate)

**Verify:** build + selfcheck png inspection

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/renderer/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VAPOR tokens", "input forwarding", "state-driven banners"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: NDI probe tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Independent koffi NDI receiver proving frames on the wire: find source, recv_capture_v2 N seconds, report {frames,fps,xres,yres,centerPx}.

**Files:** tools/ndi-probe.js.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- exit 0 iff frames>0 && xres matches
- non-black center pixel on testcard

**Verify:** node tools/ndi-probe.js VEV 10 (while app runs, Task 11)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/ndi-probe.js"], "verifyCommand": "node tools/ndi-probe.js VEV 10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["frames>0", "resolution", "pixels non-black"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Gates green
tasks.description:
**Goal:** typecheck + lint + all tests green; per-task commits done.

**Files:** n/a.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test all exit 0

**Verify:** npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all green"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Autonomous E2E verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real evidence: selfcheck run (json+png), NDI probe capture (frames/res/pixels/fps), crash-recovery run, real-page run (VEV_SELFCHECK_URL).

**Files:** artifacts in scratchpad.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- selfcheck.json ndi:live framesSent>300 sources has (VEV)
- probe frames>0 xres 1920 center non-black fps 25-35
- crash run shows recovery
- vg.no run passes probe

**Verify:** commands + captured output in session log

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "VEV_SELFCHECK=1 npm start; node tools/ndi-probe.js VEV 10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["selfcheck artifacts", "probe pass", "recovery", "real page"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Multi-agent review + fixes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Workflow: parallel reviewers (robustness checklist / Electron security / NDI+capture correctness / VAPOR+Norwegian UI), adversarial verify, fix confirmed findings, re-run gates.

**Files:** whatever findings touch.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- all CONFIRMED findings fixed or explicitly waived with reason
- gates re-green after fixes

**Verify:** workflow report + rerun of Task 10/11 commands

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["confirmed findings fixed", "gates green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: USER GATE - vMix confirm
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Nicolai confirms on real program output.

**USER-ORDERED GATE - NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it "verified inline", or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:** n/a.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- vMix -> Add Input -> NDI -> NACALAI (VEV) renders testcard with ticking clock
- navigate to real page + click link in preview; vMix follows

**Verify:** Nicolai: npm run dev in creavid-vev, add NDI input in vMix, report back

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual: vMix NDI input NACALAI (VEV)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["testcard renders in vMix", "interactive navigation visible in vMix"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "modelTier": "standard"}
```
